title: Create Kinetic
description: An addon for VS2, Adds ship totems and more.
body: [![Godlike Hosting](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1194310/description_85c75ece-38fc-4f49-929f-48dc7b8915b3.png)](https://affiliate.godlike.host/lightning-offer) # Create Kinetic Curseforge: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-kinetic Create: Kinetic is an addon for Create and VS2 that adds. Adds ship totems for easy recovery of ships, Create sails, with much more to come! *** # New Discord Server! [Join the server for announcements, bug reports, beta releases and more!](https://discord.gg/YXDsUKEMMJ) *** # Features A few of the current features ## Frequency filter Connect redstone links without colliding signals with other links! No longer worry about 2 frequencies being the same as can be the case with the traditional method of setting a 2 item frequency on a redstone link ## Retractable Sails / Sail pulleys! The game introduces retractable sails and sail pulleys, Unloose your sails to move your ship along. The sail pulley is another type of retractable sail that allows for building a mast out of blocks. ## Ship totems! If your ship runs away, just use this to bring it back. You must have the totem renamed to the name of your ship ### How to use the ship totem: 1. Obtain it (craft it) 2. rename it using `ship totem` command 3. Click the totem to bring your ship back ### New commands: * `ship this` command * `ship rename` command * `ship freeze` / `ship unfreeze` command * `vs deletemassles` and `vs total` (OP only) ## Ship Helms Steer your ship effortlessley, available in various wood types. The ship helm is designed to be an easy way to steer a VS ship without the need for a redstone controller. ## Anchor,Buoys and Ballast An anchor will stop your ship if powered by redstone. Make your ship float easier, or use a ballast to weight it down. *** # Planned * Helm/Control rework * A completely new way to control ships, control ships keyboard and mouse * Rotation limiter * Rudder (contraption or otherwise) * Use a horizontal rudder to steer, or a vertical rudder to go up/down * Tank ballast * Use redstone or water to increase/decrease ballast weight *** ## [Credits](https://github.com/Lightning323/Create-Kinetic/blob/main_create6/CREDITS) * Java base files for Sail / Wind Mechanics * Author: Quoissant (https://modrinth.com/user/Quoissant) * Sail Textures * Author: CaptainEnder (https://modrinth.com/user/CaptainEnder)
